headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dollar General (DG) After Its 114% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are trying to figure out whether Dollar General at around US$153 a share is still reasonably priced or already looking expensive, you are in the right place. The stock has been choppy in the short term, with a 0.6% decline over the last 7 days, a 6.7% gain over 30 days, and returns of 11.9% year to date and 114.5% over the last year. Over 3 years and 5 years, the returns are 25.8% and 11.4% declines respectively. These swings have come alongside ongoing attention on Dollar General's...

headline: Kohl's Q4 Earnings on Deck: What to Expect From KSS Stock?
summary: KSS heads into Q4 earnings with sales and profit expected to fall as cautious shoppers and promotions weigh, though traffic gains and proprietary brands offer some support.

raw.headline: Kohl's Q4 Earnings on Deck: What to Expect From KSS Stock?

headline: Will Petrobras Pull Off Q4 Earnings Beat on Strong Production?
summary: PBR gears up for fourth-quarter results as pre-salt output hits 3,109 MBOE/d, but refining outages and weaker fuel production may weigh on margins.

raw.headline: Will Petrobras Pull Off Q4 Earnings Beat on Strong Production?
raw.summary: PBR gears up for fourth-quarter results as pre-salt output hits 3,109 MBOE/d, but refining outages and weaker fuel production may weigh on margins.

headline: First Horizon Chief Communications Officer Named to Ragan's Top Women in Communications Class of 2026
summary: First Horizon Corporation (NYSE: FHN or "First Horizon") announced today that Beth Ardoin, Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Communications Officer, has been named to Ragan's Top Women in Communications Class of 2026, in the Change Agents category. Ragan is an industry-leading resource providing professional development, training and intelligence to communicators, marketers, HR professionals and business leaders worldwide.
